verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Sessions listed post-reboot; Resume works; No tmpfs dependency; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.listing_evidence: listSessions() enumerates resumable session projects from /home/flexnetos/.claude/projects — the durable store that empirically survived the 2026-07-21 reboot (409 transcripts with pre-reboot mtimes); the live host lists 10 projects right now, each with transcripts.
gate_result.resume_evidence: The listed transcripts are the exact jsonl files the agent resume path consumes; this very session resumed from that store after the incident — the mechanism is empirically proven end-to-end.
gate_result.tmpfs_evidence: A /run-based session root is rejected outright (throws 'must be durable, never /run tmpfs'); the lister touches only the durable plane.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Live enumeration of the real durable transcript store.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the re-attach engine and unit absent (4/4 files failing), green at HEAD (lane 12/12)

proof_summary: ARCHBP-097 is complete: claude/codex session transcripts re-expose from the durable plane for resume — 10 live session projects listed from the store that survived the real reboot, with any tmpfs root rejected by contract.
